title: Update oscore_protect_request documentation in oscore.h for SSN persistence
description: Add note about oscore_ctx_persist_ssn() being called on success path and NVM error handling to the doxygen comment. Reference security requirements for nonce uniqueness.
close_reason: Updated oscore_protect_request doxygen in oscore.h with explicit notes on success-path persist_ssn(), NVM rollback, and RFC 8613 nonce uniqueness requirements. Verified via test inspection. Committed and pushed.
